headline: Nucor (NUE) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: For as long as I've been Nucor's CEO, we have opened our earnings calls by recognizing our safety performance, and I am pleased to continue that tradition again.  In 2025, our team achieved the lowest injury and illness rate in our history, marking the eighth consecutive year of improvement.

headline: Caterpillar, IBD Stock Of The Day, Rises In Buy Zone Amid Data Center Strength
summary: Caterpillar is Tuesday's IBD Stock Of The Day as the Dow Jones Industrial Average heavyweight got a big price target hike for the second straight day on AI data center demand and the broader industrial recovery taking shape.  CAT stock rose within a buy zone.  Wells Fargo raised its CAT stock price target to 960 from 970, keeping an overweight rating, according to The Fly investment site.

headline: Steel Dynamics Sees Strong Demand For Years Amid Trump Tariffs; STLD, Nucor Break Out
summary: STLD and Nucor edged higher early Tuesday after both steel stocks broke out during Monday's regular session ahead of Steel Dynamics' late-day earnings report.  Cleveland-Cliffs opened the first-quarter earnings season for the steel sector early Monday morning, signaling an improved outlook.  Steel Dynamics' Q1 results showed a surge in earnings with a big assist from Trump tariffs.
